summary:
The query seeks a drug that directly stimulates the dilator pupillae akin to how pilocarpine directly stimulates the sphincter pupillae. Epinephrine uniquely acts as a direct agonist on alpha-adrenergic receptors in the dilator pupillae, producing dilation through similar receptor-mediated mechanisms.  

Correct answer: B (epinephrine).
